title: Ultimately Optimized+
description: A very highly optimized modpack made to continue the old ultimately optimized modpack
body:
# **Ultimately Optimized+**

A performance modpack made to make Minecraft run better — from 1.7.10 and 1.8.9 all the way up to the latest versions.

It’s clean. It’s fast. It just works.

---

## **What it does**

- **Boosts your FPS** — no complicated setup  
- **Works on older PvP versions** like 1.7.10 & 1.8.9  
- **Supports modern versions** with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/mod/Vulkanmod), etc.  
- **Supports most (Mod) loaders** such as Fabric (Sodium & Vulkan Support), Forge, Neoforge and Quilt
- **Client-side only (probably)** — safe for multiplayer  
- **Feels like vanilla** (just smoother)  
- **Shader ready** if you want that extra touch

---

## **Modloaders Version Support**

- **Fabric Support:** 1.16.5 and Above
- **Forge Support:** 1.7.10 and Above
- **NeoForge Support:** 1.21.1 and Above
- **Quilt Support:** 1.18.2 and Above

---

## **Why “+”?**

The **+** stands for a multi working modpack with:
- continuation of old project: **[Ultimately Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ultimatelyoptimizedold)**
- Pre-configured settings for less lag and better stability  
- Ready to be customized or left as is  

---

## **Built for:**

- PvPers who still plays and enjoys 1.8.9  
- Players on low-end hardware  
- People who hate stutter  
- Anyone who wants Minecraft to run like it should
- But main focus is 1.16.5 and above

---

## **Want even more FPS?**

Ultimately Optimized+ already boosts your performance out of the box — but if you're looking to squeeze out every last frame, we recommend adding a few extra mods (some available outside Modrinth):

- **Legacy Versions**
1. [Optifine](https://optifine.net/) (a lil more fps boost if needed)

- **Modern Versions**
1. Coming soon...


These mods pair perfectly with the pack and can push your performance even further.

---

## **Quick FAQ**

> **Can I add mods?**  
Yep. This is just the base — tweak it how you like.

> **Does it support shaders?**  
Definitely. [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/) on old versions) has you covered.

> **What about servers?**  
Fully client-side. Join any vanilla or modded server, no problem.

---

## **Ultimately Optimized+**  
*No bloat. No weird mods. Just better performance.*

Warning: Nvidium is experimental so if you have an nvidia gpu and cant launch minecraft disable Nvidium
